title: FAMILY MEDICAL - 211info
text: VALLEY FAMILY HEALTH CARE WOMEN AND CHILDREN CLINIC FAMILY MEDICAL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Services include behavioral health, OB/GYN, pediatric and family medical services including childhood immunizations, birth control counseling, sti screening, and women's health exams. 840 SW Fourth Avenue Ontario, OR 97914 Eligibility: Women and children Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm, Friday 8am-5pm (541) 881-2800 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 881-2800 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts Medicaid, private insurance, and payments; offers sliding scale fees DOCUMENTS: Insurance card, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Malheur County Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Birth Control Counseling Childhood Immunization Contraception Delivery/Childbirth Family and Community Medicine Infertility Services Obstetrics/Gynecology Pap Tests Pediatrics Prenatal Care Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Sexually Transmitted Infection Treatment Sterilization Vaccine Information Women's Health Centers If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. VALLEY FAMILY HEALTH CARE WOMEN AND CHILDREN CLINIC
